The '''''Aggressor''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
During one battle of the war, the ''Aggressor'' was to make an attempt to destroy the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] group [[Athega (corvette group)|''Athega'']] had the primary strike force failed. In response a Rebel cruiser arrived and sent numerous [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] to destroy it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
